title: SNAP - 211info
text: EUGENE OFFICE SNAP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides administration of SNAP (food stamps). 1015 Willamette Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Call for more information -Some programs require an in-person or phone interview appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Food Stamps/SNAP * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Food Stamps/SNAP * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - OREGON MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - MEDICAID UTILITIES - SENIOR CONNECTIONS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE OFFICE
